description: Backend Restructure — Reorganize database schemas, entities, repositories, services, controllers, and DTOs into a domain-driven architecture

userStories.title: Switch to AddIdentityCore and use IdentityUserContext
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove unused ASP.NET Identity infrastructure so that the database only contains the Users table.
acceptanceCriteria: Switch AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, IdentityRole>() to AddIdentityCore<ApplicationUser>() in Program.cs
Configure AddIdentityCore with AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>() and AddDefaultTokenProviders()
Change ApplicationDbContext base class from IdentityDbContext<ApplicationUser> to IdentityUserContext<ApplicationUser> to exclude role/claims/logins/tokens tables
Remove any IdentityRole references from the codebase
SignInManager is no longer available with AddIdentityCore — update auth endpoints to use UserManager.CheckPasswordAsync() instead if SignInManager was used
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Configure database schemas and table names in DbContext
userStories.description: As a developer, I want database tables organized under Security, Vault, and EF schemas so the database structure reflects the application domains.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure Users table as Security.Users via entity.ToTable("Users", "Security") in OnModelCreating
Configure all collection-related tables under Vault schema: Vault.CollectionTypes, Vault.Collections, Vault.CatalogItems, Vault.OwnedCopies, Vault.Sets, Vault.SetItems, Vault.WishlistItems
Configure migrations history table via UseSqlServer options: x.MigrationsHistoryTable("MigrationsHistory", "EF")
All foreign keys and indexes reference correct new table names
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Rename Models folder to Entities with Security subfolder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the User entity in Entities/Security/ so the code structure mirrors the database schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Entities/Security/ folder
Move ApplicationUser to Entities/Security/User.cs and rename class from ApplicationUser to User
Update namespace to GeekVault.Api.Entities.Security
Update all references across the project: Program.cs, ApplicationDbContext, tests, any DTOs referencing ApplicationUser
Update AddIdentityCore<ApplicationUser> to AddIdentityCore<User>
Update IdentityUserContext<ApplicationUser> to IdentityUserContext<User>
Delete the old Models/ApplicationUser.cs file
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Move Vault entities to Entities/Vault subfolder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all collection-related entities in Entities/Vault/ matching the Vault database schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Entities/Vault/ folder

Move these files to Entities/Vault/ with updated namespaces (GeekVault.Api.Entities.Vault): CollectionType.cs, Collection.cs, CatalogItem.cs, OwnedCopy.cs, OwnedCopyImage.cs, Set.cs, SetItem.cs, WishlistItem.cs, CustomFieldDefinition.cs, CustomFieldValue.cs, Visibility.cs (enum), Condition.cs (enum)
Update all using statements across Program.cs, ApplicationDbContext, and tests
Delete old files from Models/ folder and remove empty Models/ folder
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extract DTOs into domain-organized folders
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DTOs organized by domain in separate files so they are maintainable independently from entities.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DTOs/Security/ folder with AuthDtos.cs (RegisterRequest, LoginRequest, AuthResponse) and ProfileDtos.cs (UpdateProfileRequest, ProfileResponse)
Create DTOs/Vault/ folder with: CollectionTypeDtos.cs, CollectionDtos.cs, CatalogItemDtos.cs, OwnedCopyDtos.cs, SetDtos.cs, WishlistDtos.cs, DashboardDtos.cs, ImportExportDtos.cs, CustomFieldDtos.cs
Create DTOs/Common/PaginatedResponse.cs for the generic PaginatedResponse<T>
Extract all record definitions from Program.cs into these DTO files
Update all references in Program.cs to use new DTO namespaces
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Create Security repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want user data access encapsulated in a repository so endpoints don't depend directly on UserManager.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Repositories/Security/IUsersRepository.cs interface with: FindByIdAsync, FindByEmailAsync, CreateAsync, CheckPasswordAsync, UpdateAsync
Create Repositories/Security/UsersRepository.cs implementing IUsersRepository, wrapping UserManager<User>
Register IUsersRepository as AddScoped in Program.cs DI container
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Vault repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want data access for all Vault entities encapsulated in repositories.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Repositories/Vault/ folder with interfaces and implementations for: ICollectionTypesRepository/CollectionTypesRepository, ICollectionsRepository/CollectionsRepository, ICatalogItemsRepository/CatalogItemsRepository, IOwnedCopiesRepository/OwnedCopiesRepository, ISetsRepository/SetsRepository, IWishlistRepository/WishlistRepository
Each repository injects ApplicationDbContext and encapsulates all EF Core queries currently in Program.cs for that entity
CollectionsRepository includes summary/stats queries used by dashboard
CatalogItemsRepository includes search/filter/sort and bulk import operations
Register all interfaces as AddScoped in Program.cs DI container
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Security services (Auth and Profile)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want auth and profile business logic encapsulated in services.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Services/Security/IAuthService.cs and AuthService.cs with: RegisterAsync(RegisterRequest), LoginAsync(LoginRequest) — includes JWT token generation logic extracted from Program.cs
Create Services/Security/IProfileService.cs and ProfileService.cs with: GetProfileAsync(userId), UpdateProfileAsync(userId, request), UploadAvatarAsync(userId, file)
Services inject IUsersRepository (not UserManager or DbContext directly)
AuthService injects IConfiguration for JWT settings
Register all interfaces as AddScoped in Program.cs DI container
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Vault services
userStories.description: As a developer, I want business logic for all Vault entities encapsulated in services.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Services/Vault/ folder with interfaces and implementations for: ICollectionTypesService/CollectionTypesService, ICollectionsService/CollectionsService, ICatalogItemsService/CatalogItemsService, IOwnedCopiesService/OwnedCopiesService, ISetsService/SetsService, IWishlistService/WishlistService, IDashboardService/DashboardService
Each service injects its corresponding repository interface
Services contain business logic currently inline in Program.cs endpoints (validation, mapping, etc.)
Register all interfaces as AddScoped in Program.cs DI container
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract Auth and Profile endpoints into controller files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want auth and profile API endpoints in dedicated files using minimal API extension methods.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Controllers/Security/AuthController.cs with static extension method MapAuthEndpoints(this IEndpointRouteBuilder app)
Move POST /api/auth/register and POST /api/auth/login endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call IAuthService
Create Controllers/Security/ProfileController.cs with static extension method MapProfileEndpoints(this IEndpointRouteBuilder app)
Move GET /api/profile, PUT /api/profile, POST /api/profile/avatar endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call IProfileService
Call app.MapAuthEndpoints() and app.MapProfileEndpoints() in Program.cs
All API routes remain unchanged
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extract CollectionType and Collection endpoints into controller files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want collection type and collection endpoints in dedicated files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Controllers/Vault/CollectionTypesController.cs with MapCollectionTypeEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/collection-types endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call ICollectionTypesService
Create Controllers/Vault/CollectionsController.cs with MapCollectionEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/collections endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call ICollectionsService
Call extension methods in Program.cs
All API routes remain unchanged
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extract CatalogItem and OwnedCopy endpoints into controller files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want catalog item and owned copy endpoints in dedicated files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Controllers/Vault/CatalogItemsController.cs with MapCatalogItemEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/collections/{id}/items endpoints including search/filter/sort and import/export from Program.cs, refactored to call ICatalogItemsService
Create Controllers/Vault/OwnedCopiesController.cs with MapOwnedCopyEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/items/{id}/copies endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call IOwnedCopiesService
Call extension methods in Program.cs
All API routes remain unchanged
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Extract Set, Wishlist, and Dashboard endpoints into controller files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want set, wishlist, and dashboard endpoints in dedicated files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Controllers/Vault/SetsController.cs with MapSetEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/collections/{id}/sets endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call ISetsService
Create Controllers/Vault/WishlistController.cs with MapWishlistEndpoints extension method
Move all /api/collections/{id}/wishlist endpoints from Program.cs, refactored to call IWishlistService
Create Controllers/Vault/DashboardController.cs with MapDashboardEndpoints extension method
Move GET /api/dashboard from Program.cs, refactored to call IDashboardService
Call extension methods in Program.cs
All API routes remain unchanged
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Clean up Program.cs with DI extension methods
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Program.cs to be clean and under 100 lines with organized DI registration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a DI registration extension method file (e.g., Extensions/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs) with AddSecurityServices() and AddVaultServices() methods
Program.cs only contains: builder config, services.AddSecurityServices(), services.AddVaultServices(), middleware pipeline, and app.MapXxxEndpoints() calls
Health check endpoint remains in Program.cs
Remove all endpoint logic, DTOs, and inline code from Program.cs
Program.cs is under 100 lines
Swagger still works and shows all endpoints
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Delete all migrations and create clean InitialCreate
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single clean migration reflecting the new schema organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete all files in Migrations/ folder
Run: dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate
Migration creates Security schema with Users table (all Identity user columns + DisplayName, Avatar, Bio, PreferredLanguage, PreferredCurrency)
Migration creates Vault schema with all collection tables (CollectionTypes, Collections, CatalogItems, OwnedCopies, Sets, SetItems, WishlistItems)
Migrations history stored in EF.MigrationsHistory table
Drop existing database and run dotnet ef database update to verify clean creation
Verify schemas with: SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
No AspNetRoles, AspNetRoleClaims, AspNetUserClaims, AspNetUserLogins, AspNetUserRoles, or AspNetUserTokens tables exist
dotnet build succeeds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update all unit tests for new architecture
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all existing tests passing against the restructured codebase with 90%+ coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Update TestFactory.cs to work with new ApplicationDbContext (IdentityUserContext<User> base class, new entity namespaces)

Update all 13 test files (AuthEndpointsTests, ProfileEndpointsTests, CollectionTypeEndpointsTests, CollectionEndpointsTests, CatalogItemEndpointsTests, CatalogItemSearchTests, OwnedCopyEndpointsTests, SetEndpointsTests, WishlistEndpointsTests, DashboardEndpointsTests, ImportEndpointsTests, ExportEndpointsTests) with correct namespace references and entity name changes (ApplicationUser -> User)
All tests pass: dotnet test succeeds
Line coverage remains at or above 90%
dotnet build succeeds for both API and test projects
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
